name: Diabetic Washington's Cherry Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the cherries and pour them into the unbaked pie shell.
2. Cream together margarine, flour, and sugar replacement in a bowl until smooth.
3. Add egg yolks to the mixture and beat until well combined.
4. Stir in evaporated milk and vanilla extract.
5. Pour the filling over the cherries in the pie shell.
6. Bake at 450°F for 10 minutes.
7. Reduce the oven temperature to 350°F.
8. Bake for an additional 30 minutes, or until the meringue is delicately browned.
9. In a separate bowl, whip egg whites until they form soft peaks.
10. Gradually add granulated sugar replacement while continuing to whip until stiff peaks form.
11. Spread the whipped mixture evenly over the pie filling and along the edges.
12. Bake at 350°F for an additional 12-15 minutes, or until the meringue is perfectly browned.
1 serving (1/8 of the pie) = 1 fruit portion + 1 fat portion, plus pie shell exchange calories = 88 plus pie shell calories
